chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1994 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.06.2022 M/s Imam Bakhsh Dars & Muhammad Rahim Gajju, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G Sindh Additional Director General Law ECP (Khurram Shahzad), Law Officer ECP (Zaheer Abbas) & Regional Election Commissioner Hyderabad(Ali Abdullah Khalid) *** The grievance of the petitioner is that by way of impugned order dated 26.05.2022 his nomination papers have been rejected on the count that he was ‘defaulter’ of HESCO and has filed a false affidavit that he has no electricity connection; however later on it appeared that he paid some amount back. It is clearly showed that the petitioner has filed false affidavit and was also ‘defaulter’ at the time of filing his nomination papers, therefore, we find no reason to interfere with the impugned order dated 26.05.2022 and as such this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
